name: openEuler sig-Ha SIG
description: The HA SIG is responsible for the development and maintenance of High Availability Software in openEuler community.

name: openEuler sig-Ha SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-Ha SIG maintains 35 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Ha SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The HA SIG is responsible for the development and maintenance of High Availability Software in openEuler community.. The SIG has 9 core members and maintains 35 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Ha SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Ha SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ha@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Ha SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Ha SIG maintains 35 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Ha.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Ha SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Ha SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Hou Jian, Jiang Xinyu, Wang Yangli. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
